text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen extends an<n>invitation to Ikuno
Dictus, and the two<n>of them head out together to
buy<n>some training cleats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um, just for my own information,<n>where might I
find cleats designed to<n>help people get trim?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Ah, if that's what you're looking for,<n>then I know
just the—

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... I'm sorry. Actually, I think<n>you'd be
better off asking a staff<n>member.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you feeling under the<n>weather perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, it's nothing like that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then I'd very much like you to<n>continue. Please,
tell me everything<n>you know about cleats!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I can't. When it comes to cleats, I<n>lose all
restraint and tend to babble on<n>without realizing
it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If that's what you're worried about, I<n>think I can
be of assistance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I feel that you're going on and on, I<n>shall
intervene and stop you. What do<n>you think?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: But I don't want to cause you any<n>hassle...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Whatever do you mean? Think of all<n>the times I
reach for dessert when<n>I'm trying to watch my
diet. Or when<n>I'm about to stay up too late
watching<n>baseball.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When I'm struggling to exercise<n>restraint, who is
it that always<n>intervenes? It's you, is it not?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Well... I suppose that's true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'd like an opportunity to<n>repay the
favor every now and then.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: If you put it that way... Let's get<n>started.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
So, you're looking for training cleats<n>specially
designed to help you get<n>trim... Is that correct?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, I'm sorry. Was I rambling all of a<n>sudden?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Not at all. In fact, that's the side of<n>you I want to
see, Ikuno! Do continue!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Well, there are several sets of<n>cleats like that
in that corner over<n>there. Why don't we take a
look?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-now hold on, cut me a little slack<n>here!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Stay put, McQueen. It's time for your<n>cleat check!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh, McQueen... Look at these...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Since I chose these cleats myself, I<n>have a duty
to stay close to you at all<n>times and make sure
you stay safe!
choice_data_list: Why do you have to go that far?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Well, if I had to say... I guess it's<n>because I was
happy when someone<n>did it for me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
My legs were weak when I was a<n>child, so a
certain cleat-fitter made a<n>pair of cleats especially
for me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And for the same reason I mentioned<n>earlier, that
cleat-fitter stayed close to<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Their attitude and enthusiasm were<n>just so cool...
I felt like I wanted to be<n>just like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...This is the first time I've heard<n>about this.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, I just—I was rambling<n>again, wasn't I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, you weren't. That was a<n>wonderful story. In
fact, I'd like to<n>hear more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, how about this? In exchange for<n>undergoing
your cleat check, I'd like<n>to hear more of your
stories.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: You want to hear my stories?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. If we're going to be close, we<n>need to get to
know one another,<n>don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh! ...That's true. I see. I doubt my<n>stories will be
especially riveting, but I<n>hope you enjoy them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I'll be counting on you. Forthe stories and the cleats.
